invite.title: Title!
invite.message: Dear friends and family, we are thrilled to invite you to join us as we celebrate our love and commitment to each other. We have planned a beautiful wedding ceremony and reception, and we would be honored to have you there to share in our special day. Please save the date and join us for a joyous celebration filled with love, laughter, and unforgettable memories. We can't wait to see you there!

giftRegistry.title: Gift Registry
giftRegistry.description: Check out our gift registry to see what we would like

wedding.counting-down: Counting down to our special day
wedding.love-quote: "Love is not about how many days together, but about how much we grow together"
wedding.invitation-message: With hearts full of joy and gratitude, we invite you to share in the celebration of our love. Your presence in our lives has been a blessing, and we would be honored to have you witness the beginning of our forever journey together.
wedding.overjoyed-message: "We are overjoyed to share this special moment with you"
wedding.overjoyed-messaage: "We are overjoyed to share this special moment with you"
wedding.event-description: A celebration of love, carefully planned with you in mind. From sacred vows to the final worship, every moment is meant to be cherished.
wedding.ceremony-description: Exchange of vows and blessing ceremony
wedding.lunch-description: Delightful lunch and celebration with family & friends
wedding.photo-description: Capturing beautiful moments outdoors & in the lake
wedding.cake-description: Cake cutting, coffee ceremony, worship & open dance floor
wedding.save-the-date-desc: Mark your calendar for our special day
wedding.write-message: Write a message for Azaria & Ketsebaot...
wedding.excited-celebrate: We're so excited to celebrate with you! 💕 A formal ceremony invitation card will be sent to you soon for event entry.
wedding.will-miss-you: ❤️ We'll miss you! Thank you for letting us know.
wedding.gift-description: Your presence at our wedding is the greatest gift of all. However, if you wish to honor us with a gift, we have registered at the following places. We are grateful for your love and support.
wedding.traditional-message: "In Ethiopian tradition, a gift of any amount (Gursha) is a blessing. Your love and support mean more than any material gift."
wedding.thank-you-message: We can't wait to celebrate our special day with you!
wedding.thank-you-message-long: Your love, support, and presence mean the world to us. Thank you for being part of our journey.
wedding.living-room-desc: Sofa set, Coffee table, TV stand
wedding.coffee-desc: A traditional set for the Ethiopian coffee ceremony, including a jebena (coffee pot), cups, and a tray.
wedding.other-desc: Any other gift you'd like to give
wedding.dinner-desc: Dinner reservation for two at a special restaurant
wedding.section-desc: "Then our mouth was filled with laughter, and our tongue with sh outs of joy; then they said among the nations, 'The Lord has done great things for them.'"
wedding.qr-code-desc: Scan and share this QR code with guests so they can easily access our wedding website from their phones and upload their photos & videos from the event. We can't wait to celebrate with you!
wedding.qr-code-scan-desc: Use your phone's camera or a QR code scanner app to scan the code
wedding.qr-code-access-desc: Tap the notification to open our wedding website and explore all the details
wedding.qr-code-share-memory-desc: View event details, upload photos, and share your experience with us
wedding.hero-tite: By God's Grace • We Are Getting Married
wedding.capture-desc: Take photo or record video directly from your device to share your beautiful moments
wedding.tip-1: Make sure your camera is connected and not in use by another app።
wedding.tip-2: Allow camera permissions when prompted by your browser።
wedding.tip-3: If using a laptop, check if the camera is physically covered።
wedding.tip-4: Try refreshing the page if camera doesn't load።
wedding.section-b-desc-1: You saw our wedding through your own beautiful eyes. The tears, the laughter, the dances, the hugs — moments we couldn't see because we were lost in each other.
wedding.section-b-desc-2: Won't you share what you saw?
wedding.notif-1: All your memories will live forever!
wedding.upload-desc: Share photos and videos from our special day
wedding.upload-text: Every picture tells a story of our love
wedding.section-2-desc-1: "Every story has a beginning... and ours continues with you"
wedding.section-2-desc-2: Take a moment to feel the love before we continue our celebration.
wedding.gallery-desc: Browse through all the beautiful moments captured by our guests
wedding.media-notfount-msg: Try changing your filters or check back later

chapters.title: How It Began
chapters.subtitle: From social media to phone calls
chapters.description: A simple 'Hi' on social media turned into late-night chats and 4-hour phone calls. We fell for each other's words before ever seeing each other's smiles. Those first conversations? Pure magic.

chapters.title: First Meeting
chapters.subtitle: Finally face to face
chapters.description: Angila Burger witnessed our first hello in person. Months of texts and calls became real in one moment. And in that moment? We just knew.

chapters.title: Falling in Love
chapters.subtitle: The best chapter yet
chapters.description: From becoming official in October to magical dates at Friendship Park, every moment together made us certain—this was forever.

chapters.title: Meeting His Family
chapters.subtitle: Finding my second home
chapters.description: A nervous but beautiful evening - dinner with his family. From warm embraces to shared stories, I realized I wasn't just gaining a partner; I was gaining a whole new family.

chapters.title: Dreaming Together
chapters.subtitle: 6 months of planning
chapters.description: Before the ring, there were dreams. Pinterest boards, venue visits, playlist debates, and late-night talks about forever.

chapters.title: Church Wedding Teaching
chapters.subtitle: 16 weeks of spiritual preparation
chapters.description: For four transformative months, we learned what it means to build a Christ-centered marriage—communication, forgiveness, and commitment.

chapters.title: The Engagement
chapters.subtitle: A burger, a ring & a yes!
chapters.description: At Angila Burger, you got down on one knee. Between bites of our favorite meal, forever began.

chapters.title: Shimgilina Ceremony
chapters.subtitle: Honoring our traditions
chapters.description: A beautiful cultural ceremony where families became one, traditions were honored, and blessings were shared.

chapters.title: Birthday Getaway
chapters.subtitle: 3 days in Hawassa, forever in my heart
chapters.description: A beautiful trip filled with love, surprise, and unforgettable moments by the lake.

chapters.title: Wedding Photo Shoot
chapters.subtitle: Capturing forever at Unity Park
chapters.description: Every laugh and every glance captured forever in photos we'll cherish forever.

chapters.title: Our Wedding Day
chapters.subtitle: Forever begins now
chapters.description: After everything, we finally say 'I do.' This is just the beginning.

brand.message: Celebrating our love and the beautiful journey ahead. Thank you for being part of our special day and for all the love and support.
